payload.long_description: Partial view of a low-pile rectangular light-blue and gray rug with a mottled, pixelated geometric pattern; the rug is edge-cropped in the frame, shows slight wear and darker spots, and appears to lie on a wooden floor about 0.8 m from the camera.
